actionCalls.description: Simple APEX SOQL query that returns the password in plain text.
actionCalls.name: Decrypt_Password_Field_on_Lab_Report
actionCalls.label: Decrypt Password Field on Lab Report

value.stringValue: Your Genetic Test Results Access Key

actionCalls.name: Send_Lab_Report_To_Client_with_Attached_PDF_Report
actionCalls.label: Send Lab Report To Client with Attached PDF Report

actionCalls.description: This will commit the transaction without need of a screen element.
actionCalls.name: Submit_Transaction_Finalize_DrChrono_File_Upload
actionCalls.label: Submit Transaction - Finalize DrChrono File Upload

actionCalls.description: Here we will check if the Lab Result file that was uploaded was the correct one.
actionCalls.name: Verify_Lab_Result_File
actionCalls.label: Verify Lab Result File

assignments.name: Add_Task_to_Collection_of_Tasks_to_Create_Lab_Report
assignments.label: Add Task to Collection of Tasks to Create - Lab Report

assignments.name: Add_Task_to_Collection_of_Tasks_to_Create_Lab_Report_Password
assignments.label: Add Task to Collection of Tasks to Create - Lab Report Password

assignments.name: Add_the_Content_Document_Id_to_the_collection
assignments.label: Add the Content Document Id to the collection

assignments.name: Add_to_Collection
assignments.label: Add to Collection

assignments.description: Used in the Options Screen where the user can toggle and view an older version of the report details
assignments.name: Add_to_Collection_of_Content_Versions
assignments.label: Add to Collection of Content Versions

assignments.description: Here we do a count so we can decide if a file has been uploaded to SF or not from the Regen process.
assignments.name: Count_How_Many_Lab_Reports_were_Created
assignments.label: Count How Many Lab Reports were Created

assignments.name: Count_Lab_Orders
assignments.label: Count Lab Orders

assignments.name: Count_Number_of_Lab_Reports_Found
assignments.label: Count Number of Lab Reports Found

assignments.name: Count_Number_Times_We_Are_Waiting_For_Generations
assignments.label: Count Number Times We Are Waiting For Generations

assignments.name: Create_Options_Icons
assignments.label: Create Options - Icons

assignments.name: Create_Options_Values
assignments.label: Create Options - Values

value.stringValue: Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity
Upload Lab Results File to Opportunity
Regenerate 10x Test Report to Latest Version
Email Client the Current 10x Test Report

assignments.name: Empty_ContentDocumentLink_Collection
assignments.label: Empty ContentDocumentLink Collection

assignments.name: Set_Boolean_Flag_that_an_Older_Version_has_been_sent
assignments.label: Set Boolean Flag that an Older Version has been sent

assignments.name: Set_Closed_Stage_Genetic_Testing_Results_Delivered_To_Client
assignments.label: Set Closed Stage - Genetic Testing - Results Delivered To Client

assignments.name: Set_Content_Document_Id_Back_to_Latest_Version
assignments.label: Set Content Document Id Back to Latest Version

assignments.name: Set_Content_Document_Id_Older_Version_That_Was_Sent
assignments.label: Set Content Document Id - Older Version That Was Sent

assignments.name: Set_Content_Document_Id_Selected_Older_Version
assignments.label: Set Content Document Id - Selected Older Version

assignments.name: Set_ContentDocument_Id
assignments.label: Set ContentDocument Id

assignments.name: Set_ContentDocument_Id_Old_Version
assignments.label: Set ContentDocument Id - Old Version

assignments.description:
This is a step to make sure the formula fields are updated correctly as they are based on the Quick Choice component at the start of this flow to determine how to name the files.
So here we will change what that direction to make sure the files get named Lab Result
assignments.name: Set_Direction_Variable
assignments.label: Set Direction Variable

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_In_Person
assignments.label: Set Email Template - In-Person

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_Virtual
assignments.label: Set Email Template - Virtual

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Error_in_API_Call_Generate_Lab_Report
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Error in API Call - Generate Lab Report

assignments.description: Probably not needed as the version check will catch this, but an extra check to make sure users don't send unprotected docs to customers.
assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Lab_Report_Doesn_t_Have_A_Password
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Lab Report Doesn't Have A Password

value.stringValue: The 10x Test Report file that was found is not protected and can't be resent. Please generate a new version before sending the client their 10x Test Report.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Lab_Report_Version_Out_of_Date
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Lab Report Version Out of Date

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Files_found_on_the_Opportunity
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Files found on the Opportunity

value.stringValue: We couldn't find any files on this Opportunity. Please upload the Lab Result file to continue.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Lab_Report_Found
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Lab Report Found

value.stringValue: No 10x Test Report file is found on Opportunity.

assignments.description: If no Lab Report has been sent, then we want the user to regenerate a new version to send to the client.
assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Lab_Reports_Have_Been_Email_Prior
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Lab Reports Have Been Email Prior

value.stringValue: We found 10x Lab Reports on this Opportunity, but since none have been sent and there is a new version, we need you to generate a new 10x Test Report File before emailing the patient.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Lab_Result_Found
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Lab Result Found

value.stringValue: No Lab Result file was found, please upload a Lab Result file.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Latest_Version_Need_to_Generate
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Latest Version Need to Generate

value.stringValue: We need to generate a new 10x Lab Report as there is not one created for this opportunity.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_Request_Id_Generate_Lab_Report
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No Request Id - Generate Lab Report

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_No_To_Address_Was_Set
assignments.label: Set Error Message - No To Address Was Set

value.stringValue: No Patient Email address found. Please use the text box below to set the patient email.

assignments.name: Set_Found_HL7_File_to_True
assignments.label: Set Found HL7 File to True

assignments.name: Set_Found_Report_to_True
assignments.label: Set Found Report to True

assignments.name: Set_Global_Variables_for_Email
assignments.label: Set Global Variables for Email

assignments.name: Set_HL7_Content_Document_Id
assignments.label: Set HL7 Content Document Id

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Id_Selected
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Id - Selected

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Id_Single
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Id - Single

assignments.name: Set_Last_Sent_Date_from_ContentDocument
assignments.label: Set Last Sent Date from ContentDocument

assignments.name: Set_Last_Sent_Date_from_ContentDocument_Old_Version
assignments.label: Set Last Sent Date from ContentDocument - Old Version

assignments.name: Set_Patient_Email
assignments.label: Set Patient Email

assignments.name: Set_Task_Variables_10x_Report_Password_Sent
assignments.label: Set Task Variables - 10x Report Password Sent

value.stringValue: Genetic Test Report Access Key Sent

assignments.name: Set_Task_Variables_10x_Report_Sent
assignments.label: Set Task Variables - 10x Report Sent

assignments.name: Set_the_Content_Document_Id_Regenerated_File
assignments.label: Set the Content Document Id - Regenerated File

assignments.name: Set_the_File_Type_Lab_Report
assignments.label: Set the File Type - Lab Report

assignments.name: Set_Upload_10x_Test_File_Conditional_Visibility_Upload_Lab_Report
assignments.label: Set Upload 10x Test File - Conditional Visibility - Upload Lab Report

assignments.name: Set_Upload_Lab_File_Conditional_Visibility_No_Files
assignments.label: Set Upload Lab File - Conditional Visibility - No Files

assignments.name: Set_Upload_Lab_File_Conditional_Visibility_No_Lab_Result_Found
assignments.label: Set Upload Lab File - Conditional Visibility - No Lab Result Found

assignments.name: Set_Upload_Lab_File_Conditional_Visibility_Upload_Lab_Result_File
assignments.label: Set Upload Lab File - Conditional Visibility - Upload Lab Result File

assignments.name: Set_Upload_Lab_File_Conditional_Visibility_Version_Mismatch
assignments.label: Set Upload Lab File - Conditional Visibility - Version Mismatch

assignments.description: This is where all the defaults for variables get set before the flow launches
assignments.name: Set_Variables_Used_In_Flow
assignments.label: Set Variables Used In Flow

decisions.description: Using the response from Generate Result, we will check to make sure that we have a responseId and we did not error out
decisions.name: Did_Generate_New_Lab_Report_Error_Out
decisions.label: Did Generate New Lab Report Error Out

decisions.name: Did_Lab_Result_File_Match_the_Account_and_Opportunity
decisions.label: Did Lab Result File Match the Account and Opportunity

decisions.name: Did_we_Assign_an_Email_Address
decisions.label: Did we Assign an Email Address?

decisions.description: Here we are looking to see if there is a Lab Report; if there is, we can continue to check the version; if not, we want to let the end user know and generate a new version for them so they can continue with what they were doing.
decisions.name: Did_we_find_a_Lab_Report
decisions.label: Did we find a Lab Report

rules.name: Up_to_date_Version_10x_Lab_Report_was_Found
rules.label: Up to date Version 10x Lab Report was Found

decisions.description: Here we make a decision of asking the user to upload a Lab Result file so we can generate the Lab Report or we continue to the next screen.
decisions.name: Did_we_find_a_Lab_Result_File
decisions.label: Did we find a Lab Result File

decisions.description: We want to check that we found an Opportunity so that we can assign/retrieve records correctly
decisions.name: Did_we_Find_an_Opportunity
decisions.label: Did we Find an Opportunity

decisions.name: Do_Versions_Match
decisions.label: Do Versions Match

decisions.description: Based if the checkbox is checked, we will close the opportunity. This will help reduce the possibility of the user not closing the oppty or closing it incorrectly.
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_close_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Do we need to close the Opportunity

decisions.name: Does_Lab_Result_File_Have_Password
decisions.label: Does Lab Result File Have Password

decisions.description: If no files are found, we can't do anything
decisions.name: Found_Content_Document_Link
decisions.label: Found Content Document Link

decisions.name: How_Many_Lab_Orders_Were_Found
decisions.label: How Many Lab Orders Were Found

decisions.description: This is our catch if we have been waiting for 5 minutes, we want to bail out. Each try is 30 seconds.
decisions.name: How_Many_Tries_Have_We_Made
decisions.label: How Many Tries Have We Made

decisions.description: If the count is greater than 0 then we can restart the search of the file and let the user resend the file.
decisions.name: Is_Count_for_Verify_Records_Greater_Than_0
decisions.label: Is Count for Verify Records Greater Than 0
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No New File is uploaded. Go back to Loading Screen

rules.name: We_verified_that_a_new_file_is_uploaded
rules.label: We verified that a new file is uploaded

decisions.name: Is_Error_Get_Result_Info
decisions.label: Is Error - Get Result Info

decisions.description: Checks if the Opportunity.Lab Provider exists or not
decisions.name: Is_Lab_Provider_Set_On_Opportunity
decisions.label: Is Lab Provider Set On Opportunity

decisions.name: Is_Last_Sent_Date_Less_Than_Current_ContentDocument
decisions.label: Is Last Sent Date Less Than Current ContentDocument
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Less Than ContentDocument Last Sent Date

rules.name: Greater_Than_ContentDocument_Last_Sent_Date
rules.label: Greater Than ContentDocument Last Sent Date

decisions.name: Is_Last_Sent_Date_Less_Than_Current_ContentDocument_Old_Version
decisions.label: Is Last Sent Date Less Than Current ContentDocument - Old Version
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Less Than ContentDocument Last Sent Date - Old Version

rules.name: Greater_Than_ContentDocument_Last_Sent_Date_Old_Version
rules.label: Greater Than ContentDocument Last Sent Date - Old Version

decisions.name: Is_Latest_Version
decisions.label: Is Latest Version

decisions.description: The Latest Version could be null if there are only old GT records that have been sent on the oppty.
decisions.name: Is_Latest_Version_Null
decisions.label: Is Latest Version Null

decisions.name: Is_Older_Version
decisions.label: Is Older Version

decisions.name: Is_Required_Shipping
decisions.label: Is Required Shipping

decisions.name: Is_There_a_Last_Sent_Date
decisions.label: Is There a Last Sent Date

decisions.name: Is_This_a_Lab_Report_File_Type
decisions.label: Is This a Lab Report File Type
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not a Lab Report File Type

decisions.name: Is_This_a_Lab_Result_File_Type
decisions.label: Is This a Lab Result File Type
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not a Lab Result File Type

decisions.name: Older_Version_Button
decisions.label: Older Version Button

decisions.name: Redirect_Back_to_Previous_Direction
decisions.label: Redirect Back to Previous Direction

decisions.name: Send_Lab_Report_Email_to_Client
decisions.label: Send Lab Report Email to Client

rules.name: Send_Lab_Report_Email_to_Client_Decision
rules.label: Send Lab Report Email to Client

decisions.name: Verify_Lab_Result_Is_Error
decisions.label: Verify Lab Result - Is Error

rules.name: Verification_of_Lab_Results_Errored_Out
rules.label: Verification of Lab Results Errored Out

decisions.name: What_does_the_user_want_to_do_Upload_Mismatched_Lab_Result_File
decisions.label: What does the user want to do -- Upload Mismatched Lab Result File

rules.name: Nope_Don_t_Want_To_Do_This
rules.label: Nope Don't Want To Do This

decisions.description: Since each opportunity would have different stages, we need to direct the values through this decision
decisions.name: What_Record_Type_is_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: What Record Type is the Opportunity

decisions.name: Which_Action
decisions.label: Which Action

decisions.description: Since we are using custom buttons we need to let flow know where to go
decisions.name: Which_Button_Clicked_Lab_Result_Verification_Failed
decisions.label: Which Button Clicked - Lab Result Verification Failed

rules.name: Save_Lab_Result_to_this_Opportunity

rightValue.stringValue: Save Lab Result to this Opportunity

rules.label: Save Lab Result to this Opportunity

decisions.description: This will navigate the user to the correct path depending on what choice they chose at the beginning
decisions.name: Which_Direction
decisions.label: Which Direction
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Resend/Regen/View Password of current Lab Report

rightValue.stringValue: Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity
Upload Lab Results File to Opportunity

decisions.description: If the file is a Lab Result, we need to make sure the file that was uploaded was the correct one, if not, then we need to delete the file and ask the user to upload the correct one.
decisions.name: Which_Lab_File_Was_Uploaded
decisions.label: Which Lab File Was Uploaded

Flow.description: This tool holds different functions for the end user to manage 10x Test Results from the Lab Results received.

formulas.description: Since the version is 2.3-dc9999 we only need the 2.3
formulas.name: formTxt_ActualLabReportVersion
formTxt_fileExtension
formulas.expression: IF({!qcDirection.value} = 'Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity','.PDF', '.HL7')

formulas.description: This is used to set the file type when uploading a file dynamically
formulas.name: formTxt_fileType
formulas.expression: IF({!qcDirection.value} = 'Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity','10x Test Report', 'Lab Result')

formulas.description: This is used to allow the file upload to be dynamic between both report types
formulas.name: formTxt_fileUploadValidationMessage
formulas.expression: IF({!qcDirection.value} = 'Upload Lab Report to Opportunity','Lab Report Required', 'Lab Result Required')

Flow.label: Screenflow - 10x Lab Report/Result Management Tool

loops.description: This will loop through all the documents, find the Report, and match the version. A new file will be generated if the version and/or file doesn't exist.
loops.name: Find_Lab_Report_File_File_Report
loops.label: Find Lab Report File - File Report

loops.description: This will find the HL7 File we need to compare the document's version too.
loops.name: Find_Lab_Results_File_Type_File_Result
loops.label: Find Lab Results File Type - File Result

recordDeletes.name: Delete_Uploaded_File_Upload_New_File
recordDeletes.label: Delete Uploaded File - Upload New File

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Document_Verify_File_is_Present_on_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Content Document - Verify File is Present on Opportunity

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Version_Loop_Through_Content_Documents
recordLookups.label: Get Content Version - Loop Through Content Documents

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Version_Verify_File_is_Present_on_Opportunity_Final
recordLookups.label: Get Content Version - Verify File is Present on Opportunity - Final

recordLookups.description: Get's Lab Orders that are linked the the Opportunity.
recordLookups.name: Get_Lab_Orders
recordLookups.label: Get Lab Orders

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Lab Report/Result file with the correct custom fields values
recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_File
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab File

recordUpdates.description: This will update the last sent date on the Lab Report.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Report_ContentVersion_Last_Sent_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Report - ContentVersion Last Sent Date

recordUpdates.description: One or both may be updated here. - Set Stage to Closed - Set Patient Email
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity

screens.name: Cant_Regenerate_Without_A_Lab_Order
screens.label: Can't Regenerate Without A Lab Order

fields.name: txt_ErrorMessage_NoLabOrders
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Yellow}

We are unable to regenerate the report because there are no Lab Orders in a Status of Results Delivered.

screens.name: Error_API_Endpoint_Failed_Generate_Lab_Report
screens.label: Error - API Endpoint Failed - Generate Lab Report

fields.name: txtErrorGenerateLabReport
fields.fieldText: {!txt_errorMessage}

fields.name: txtErrorNoPatientEmail
fields.fieldText: {!txt_errorMessage}

screens.name: Error_Record_Id_Was_Not_Found
screens.label: Error - Record Id Was Not Found

fields.name: txtRecordIdNotOppty
fields.fieldText: The entered record was not an Opportunity Id. Please add this flow to an Opportunity record page or action with recordId being passed in.

screens.name: Error_Something_Has_Happened_No_Files_Found
screens.label: Error Something Has Happened - No Files Found

fields.name: txtNumberOfTriesMaxedOut
fields.fieldText: We ran into an issue generating the new 10x Lab Report file. Please close this screen and try again.

fields.name: txtShowConfirmation_LabReportEmailSent
fields.fieldText: 10x Lab Report and Password Successfully Sent to: {!Get_Opportunity_Details.Patient_Email__c}

fields.name: txtShowConfirmation_OpportunityClosed
fields.fieldText: Opportunity Successfully Closed, and the stage set to: {!txtOpptyClosedStageName}

screens.name: Final_Confirmation_Verify_Results_Do_Not_Match
screens.label: Final Confirmation - Verify Results Do Not Match

fields.name: txtHeaderConfirmationLabReportDataDoesntMatch
fields.fieldText: Warning: You are about to associate Patient information with an account that DOES NOT MATCH key PHI information in the document

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Yes, I Understand","value":"Yes, I Understand","iconPosition":"left","variant":"destructive","index":0},{"label":"No, Don't Upload This File","value":"No, Don't Upload This File","iconPosition":"left","variant":"success","index":1}]

fields.name: txtErrorGetDocumentInfo
fields.fieldText:
Error Retrieving Lab Report Details:


{!Get_Document_Result_Info_API.httpStatusCode}

{!Get_Document_Result_Info_API.errorMessage}

fields.name: txt_HeaderMain
fields.fieldText: {!const_txtScreenImageHeader}

screens.name: Lab_Result_File_Verify_Failed
screens.label: Lab Result File - Verify Failed

fields.name: txtLabResultVerifiedFailed
fields.fieldText: {!txtLabResultVerificationFailed}

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Close","value":"Close","iconPosition":"left","variant":"destructive","iconName":null,"index":0},{"label":"Upload New Lab Result File","value":"Upload New Lab Result File","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","iconName":"utility:upload","index":1},{"label":"Save Lab Result to this Opportunity","value":"Save Lab Result to this Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"base","index":2}]

screens.nextOrFinishButtonLabel: Upload a new Lab Result File

fields.name: txtLoading_ReportGenerating
fields.fieldText:
.

Creating 10x Test Report

.

.

screens.name: No_Lab_Provider_Select_Lab_Provider
screens.label: No Lab Provider - Select Lab Provider

fields.name: txt_HeaderNoLabProvider
fields.fieldText:
{!const_txtScreenImageHeader}


To proceed, kindly choose the required values and click on Save since some information is still missing.

fields.name: Lab_Provider
fields.fieldText: Lab Provider

screens.description: This will show the password, version, and different options to the end user so they can close and send the client a lab report.
screens.name: Show_Lab_Report_Details_and_Options_to_End_User
screens.label: Show Lab Report Details and Options to End User

fields.name: txtOptionsScreenHeader
fields.fieldText: 10x Report Options

fields.name: txtShowingOlderVersion
fields.fieldText: WARNING -- You are currently viewing an older version of the 10x Report. A new version of this report is ready to be generated. Click View Latest Version to generate that version.

fields.name: txtLabReportDetails_OptionsScreen
fields.fieldText:
10x Test Report File Details:


{!txtLabReportDetails}

value.stringValue: [{"label":"View Selected Version","value":"View Selected Version","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"View Latest Version","value":"View Latest Version","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand-outline","index":1}]

fields.name: txtWhatToSend
fields.fieldText: Select What You Want To Do:

fields.name: Re_Send_10x_Test_Report_Email
fields.fieldText: Re-Send 10x Test Report Email

fields.name: txtSuccessText_FileUploaded
fields.fieldText: {!formTxt_LabReportName} has been successfully uploaded to {!Get_Opportunity_Details.Name}

screens.name: The_Lab_Result_file_is_found_on_Opportunity
screens.label: The Lab Result file is found on Opportunity.

fields.name: txtHeader_GenerateLabReport_1
fields.fieldText: {!txt_errorMessage}

fields.name: txtHeader_GenerateLabReport_2
fields.fieldText: Click Create 10x Test Report to create a 10x Test Report.

fields.name: txtHeader_GenerateLabReport_3
fields.fieldText: Please note this may take up to 1 minute to generate.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Try Again - Create 10x Test Report Report","value":"Try Again - Create 10x Test Report Report","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0}]

screens.name: Upload_Lab_Report_or_Lab_Result
screens.label: Upload Lab Report or Lab Result

fields.name: txtUploadFileHeader
fields.fieldText: {!qcDirection.value}

fields.name: uploadedFileIsPasswordProtected
fields.fieldText: File is Password Protected

fields.name: uploadedLabReportPassword
fields.fieldText: File's Password

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Previous","value":"Previous","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":0},{"label":"Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity","value":"Upload 10x Test Report File to Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1}]

[{"label":"Previous","value":"Previous","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":0},{"label":"Upload Lab Result File to Opportunity","value":"Upload Lab Result File to Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":1}]

fields.name: verifyLabResultsErrorText
fields.fieldText:
Lab Results Verification Process Failed


Error Message: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.errorMessage}


Error Code: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.httpStatusCode}

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBody_NoPassword
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Details.Account.FirstName}, Are you ready to unlock your genetic report? To get started, simply use the password below: Password: XXXXXXXX As a team dedicated to helping you achieve optimal health, we're here to answer any questions you may have. Don't hesitate to reach out to us at 305.682.1818.
In your health, Your 10X Health Team 10X Health Main: 305.682.1818 Fax: 786.598.8612 10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBody_Password
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Get_Opportunity_Details.Account.FirstName},
Are you ready to unlock your genetic report? To get started, simply use the password below:
Password: {!txtPassword}
As a team dedicated to helping you achieve optimal health, we're here to answer any questions you may have.
Don't hesitate to reach out to us at 305.682.1818.
In your health, Your 10X Health Team 10X Health Main: 305.682.1818 Fax: 786.598.8612 10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtLabReportDetails
textTemplates.text:
Document Name: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Title}


File Version: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Generator_Version__c}


Created On: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.CreatedDate}


Last Sent On: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Last_Sent_Date__c}


Lab Provider: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Lab_Provider__c}


Password to Lab Report file: {!txtPassword}


Customer Email: {!Get_Opportunity_Details.Patient_Email__c}

textTemplates.name: txtLabReportVersionOutOfDate
textTemplates.text:
The 10x Test Report file found on Opportunity is out of date.


Current 10x Test Report File Version: {!Get_Document_Result_Info_API.currentVersion}

Current 10x Test Report File Hash: {!Get_Document_Result_Info_API.fileHash}

Actual 10x Test Report File Version: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Generator_Version__c}

Actual 10x Test Report File Hash: {!Get_Content_Version_Final.Lab_Result_File_Hash__c}

textTemplates.name: txtLabResultVerificationFailed
textTemplates.text:
Lab Result File Verification Failed:

{!Verify_Lab_Result_File.errorMessage}


Additional Details:

Provided Lab Result Opportunity: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.providedOpportunity_Name}

Provided Lab Result Account: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.providedAccount_Name}


Actual Lab Result Opportunity: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.actualOpportunity_Name}

Actual Lab Result Account: {!Verify_Lab_Result_File.actualAccount_Name}

variables.description: Can be used in multiple screens to show error messages throughout this flow
variables.name: bool_isError

variables.description: Used to show/hide the Lab Report Button or show/hide the Lab Result Button in the File upload screen
variables.name: bool_ShowLabReport

variables.description: This is uses to hide/show the "Create Lab Report" button in the Genereate Lab Report screen
variables.name: boolShowGenerateLabReportButton

variables.description: Used with bool_isError to describe why there is an error
variables.name: txt_errorMessage

variables.description: Used in the final confirmation screen to let the users know which stage the oppty was set to
variables.name: txtOpptyClosedStageName
